result.reasoning: The tool call history from step_3 provides the extracted analysis results from the article. It states: "总问题数量: 29\n狗相关问题数量: 14\n主人相关问题数量: 15". This means there were 14 dog-related questions and 15 owner-related questions in the first table. The user asks "how many more dog questions were there than owner questions". This is calculated as (dog questions) - (owner questions) = 14 - 15 = -1. Therefore, there was 1 fewer dog question than owner question. The final answer is a number, so no text casing rule applies.
